ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., sh.603607) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector the stock belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Stock description */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Listing date of the stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "preclose_price" REAL /* Previous closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Total amount traded on the given date */,
  "adjust_flag" INTEGER /* Adjust flag for the price record */,
  "turn" REAL /* Turn of the stock on the given date */,
  "trading_status" INTEGER /* Trading status of the stock on the given date */,
  "pct_chg" REAL /* Percentage change of the stock's price on the given date */,
  "is_st" INTEGER /* ST status of the stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the indicator record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator record */,
  "sma_50" REAL /* Simple Moving Average (50 days) of the stock's price */,
  "sma_200" REAL /* Simple Moving Average (200 days) of the stock's price */,
  "rsi_14" REAL /* Relative Strength Index (14 days) of the stock's price */,
  "bollinger_bands" REAL /* Bollinger Bands of the stock's price */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission record belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_stock_data, edit_stock_data) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange record */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stock exchange is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry record */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the industry belongs to */,
  "sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector the industry belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_map" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id", "industry_id")
)
